label: Whisper budget enforcement
description: Mirror must respect the whisper budget per conversation. Exceeding the limit degrades trust in the system.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Whisper delivery attempted after budget exhausted
causal_translation.rule_text: Hard cap on whisper count prevents notification fatigue
causal_translation.shift_text: System suppresses remaining insights until conversation ends
causal_translation.effect_text: User trusts the system to stay quiet
